title: Reduce Cyclomatic Complexity
description: Flatten deeply nested or branch-heavy logic.
content:
This function has too many branches/nesting levels:

```
{{code}}
```

Reduce its complexity using guard clauses, early returns, lookup tables, polymorphism, or extraction — whichever fits. Keep behavior identical, including edge cases. Show the before/after complexity intuition and confirm every original branch is still covered.
